title: 'Bare Metals' for Create: Hypertubes
body:
Create Hypertubes but with Bare Metals/Bare Bones!

# Credits:
Bare Bones: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones

Bare Metals: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-metals

Create: Hypertubes: https://modrinth.com/mod/hypertube

Cogwheel texture is taken from Bare Metals

The shader used in the pictures is [Solas Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader)

## FAQ
Q. Will there be a 1.20.1 version?

A. The 1.21 version might work on 1.20, see if it works



Q. CurseForge page?

A. Currently this pack is only on Modrinth.



Q. Do I need Bare Bones + Bare Metals to use this?

A. No, but you should get those too.



Q. Is this a official Bare Metals or Bare Bones resource pack?

A. No, but it was made to look like it was.



Q. I need packs for different addons!

A. Check my profile or the [Bare Metals Addons, recognized by the Bare Metals creator.](https://modrinth.com/collection/GEcFHDu3)
